name: METACHROMATIC LEUKODYSTROPHY
definition: MLD = most common hereditary (autosomal recessive) leukodystrophy (dysmyelinating
discriminating_features: progressive loss of hemispheric brain tissue
symmetric low density of white matter adjacent to ventricles (esp. centrum ovale and
progressive symmetrical areas of hypointensity on T1WI

general: progressive loss of hemispheric brain tissue
CT: symmetric low density of white matter adjacent to ventricles (esp. centrum ovale and
MR: progressive symmetrical areas of hypointensity on T1WI
early sparing of internal capsule + subcortical U-fibers
